about.title: What Is a Landing Page?
about.description1: A landing page is a single-page website designed to guide visitors toward one specific goal. Whether you want more inquiries, bookings, leads, or sales, every section is strategically built to encourage action.
about.description2: Unlike traditional multi-page websites, landing pages remove distractions and focus attention on what matters most — converting visitors into customers.

mainCard.title: Built for Conversions
mainCard.description: Every section has a purpose and helps visitors move toward contacting your business.

benefits.description: A landing page is focused on one goal. Unlike traditional websites, it eliminates distractions and helps visitors take action faster.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to the most common questions about landing pages, development process, SEO, and Google Ads.

item1.question: How long does it take to build a landing page?
item1.answer: Most landing pages are completed within 1–2 weeks, depending on the project scope, content availability, and required integrations.

item2.question: Will the landing page work on mobile devices?
item2.answer: Yes. Every landing page is fully responsive and optimized for smartphones, tablets, and desktop devices.

item3.question: Can you create a multilingual landing page?
item3.answer: Absolutely. We can build landing pages in multiple languages and provide language switching functionality.

item4.question: Do you help with Google Ads?
item4.answer: Yes. We can prepare the landing page for advertising campaigns, configure analytics, conversion tracking, and assist with Google Ads setup.

item5.question: Is SEO included?
item5.answer: Basic SEO optimization is included in every project, including proper page structure, metadata, performance optimization, and mobile usability.

item6.question: Can the landing page be expanded later?
item6.answer: Yes. A landing page can later be expanded into a full business website with additional pages and functionality.
